name: What if I had asthma before starting this dusty job?

mainEntity.name: What if I had asthma before starting this dusty job?

acceptedAnswer.description: You can still claim if work aggravated it substantially—'apportionment' reduces but doesn't eliminate benefits. Prove worsening via medical opinion[4]. - Compare pre/post lung tests. Aggravation qualifies. Get specialist eval showing job role.
